---
title: "About Me"
---

About this site

## Cat Photo Gallery

::: {.gallery-grid}
<a href="images/photo1.jpg" class="glightbox" data-gallery="gallery1">
  <img src="images/photo1.jpg" alt="Photo 1">
</a>

<a href="images/photo2.jpg" class="glightbox" data-gallery="gallery1">
  <img src="images/photo2.jpg" alt="Photo 2">
</a>

<a href="images/photo3.jpg" class="glightbox" data-gallery="gallery1">
  <img src="images/photo3.jpg" alt="Photo 3">
</a>

<a href="images/photo4.jpg" class="glightbox" data-gallery="gallery1">
  <img src="images/photo4.jpg" alt="Photo 4">
</a>

<a href="images/photo5.jpg" class="glightbox" data-gallery="gallery1">
  <img src="images/photo5.jpg" alt="Photo 5">
</a>

<a href="images/photo6.jpg" class="glightbox" data-gallery="gallery1">
  <img src="images/photo6.jpg" alt="Photo 6">
</a>

:::

<script>
  const lightbox = GLightbox({
    touchNavigation: true,
    loop: true,
    zoomable: true
  });
</script>
